title: Affiliate program
description: Share LobbyStack with operators and agencies. We track referrals, commissions, and monthly manual PayPal payouts from here.

inactive.title: Start earning with LobbyStack
inactive.description: Activate your affiliate profile to get a referral link and track clicks, signups, conversions, and earnings.

referral.title: Referral link
referral.description: Share this link anywhere you recommend LobbyStack.

terms.title: Rewards
terms.description: Manual PayPal payouts after the holding period clears.

stats.eligibleReady: Ready for the next payout run.
stats.paidDescription: Marked paid after manual PayPal payout.

share.title: Share your link
share.description: Use your LobbyStack referral link in posts, newsletters, websites, and direct recommendations.

resources.title: Use accurate claims
resources.description: Describe LobbyStack honestly and disclose that you may earn a commission.

receive.title: Receive earnings
receive.description: Eligible balances of $100 or more are reviewed monthly and paid manually through PayPal.

settings.title: Affiliate settings
settings.description: Add the PayPal email where manual payouts should be sent.
settings.paypalDescription: Only PayPal payouts are supported in v1.

when.question: When do commissions become payable?
when.answer: Commissions become eligible 30 days after the referred customer's payment.

minimum.question: What is the minimum payout?
minimum.answer: Eligible unpaid commissions must reach $100 before they are included in a monthly payout run.

method.question: How are payouts sent?
method.answer: LobbyStack pays affiliates manually through PayPal using the PayPal email saved in settings.

refunds.question: What happens after a refund?
refunds.answer: Unpaid commissions can be voided or reversed if the underlying payment is refunded or disputed.
